messages.text: gm ser. restaking safe still 2/3 right? want to redeploy the LP this week, lmk before I touch the multisig
saw your ngmi-labs commits ser, clean assembly. building something stealth, need a real solidity head not a VC shill. can you fork-test a repo locally? pre-TGE, alpha only for the based

just listened. 3am here, half asleep. so they really are flagging every TC depositor post-2021? fk. yeah I... had one. small. didn't think anyone was watching back then. tell me more tmrw, can barely type rn ser
degens. stealth L2 launched 20min ago, no VC, anti-CBDC manifesto in the docs, im aping. wagmi or ngmi but the math is wild. NFA but you know
yo. forked the thing you sent. looks like a honeypot but the withdraw logic is cursed in a fun way. signing the sim now. drunk. gn
lol real q — did you DM me a contract at like 3:30 last night? 'check this honeypot' ? cant find it in our thread now (disappearing) and im paranoid post-Marcus
at this natural wine place in príncipe real pretending to enjoy it. you anywhere fun or you also lying to yourself on a tuesday

might finally be in Porto next month, ser. been wanting to put a face to the voice notes 🙂 still cold-storing everything? you said two countries — that's smart. most people keep it all in one place and lose it all in one night

gov vote passed, restaking emissions cut 12%. our 0.4% still prints tho. and yes the safe is still 2/3, stop asking, update your dead-man signer someday tho ser it's still pointing at sarah's old addr lol
ser the protocol freeze starts Wed, no more deploys till the audit clears. gonna be a death march. forking the vault tests all weekend, send coffee 🪦
mm just woke to ur voice note… ur voice is the only good thing about 3am tbh. yeah. the treasury thing scares me too but i'd rather be awake and scared with u than asleep and normie. talk tmrw, ok? 🌙
hey 0xluso, you around? PR #214 is blocking the rebalance branch — your sim is reverting on the edge case. can you push the fix before freeze locks main? we're tight on the window
so. might actually be in Porto next week. no promises, my life is chaos, but. i keep thinking about it. would u even want to see me irl or do i just live better in ur DMs anon 😏
pushing the vault rebalance fix now, the revert was a rounding edge in the share math. review when ur up? before freeze eats us. last thing into main probably
skipping LX Factory tonight lads, protocol freeze = i live in a terminal till friday. drink one for me. wagmi 🫡
sry typing one-handed, eyes barely open. brutal deploy week, freeze tomorrow, brain is soup. but i opened ur note before i even checked my portfolio so. make of that what u will, anon. night ❤️
bro you good? you sound fried in the PR comments, like genuinely off. eat something. sleep. freeze isn't worth a stroke ser. ping me if you need a second pair of eyes
Porto. Tuesday. i'll be there for real this time. do u want to actually meet, Tyler? coffee, no screens, no handles. just say yes or tell me i'm reading this wrong
lol i'm fine, surviving. honestly met an interesting researcher lately, sharp on the chain-analysis stuff, kinda restored my faith. anyway. ignore me i'm sleep deprived. how's the stax
i know i should be more careful. i know what i'd tell anyone else in my position. but yeah. yes. i want to meet u. the freeze ends thursday and then my week is yours. don't disappear on me ok
survived the freeze, main is locked, audit's in. gm degens, i am once again a person who exists outdoors. who's at Copenhagen later ☕
ok i'm slightly drunk and being honest: maybe Porto. let's see. part of me is screaming this is a rug and part of me doesn't care. that's probably bad data. tell me ur real sometime, anon. night
deploy goes live tonight ser. you around to co-sign the sanity check? want a second set of eyes on the constructor before we send it
ok final params locked — fee bps 30, treasury multisig confirmed, oracle window 600s. pushing the verified source after. gm wagmi
[voice-note transcript saved → notes/v_/] '...3am again huh. i can always tell when you're awake. you carry it all alone, anon. you don't have to.' — screenshotted before it auto-deletes
shipped. dead. crashing. 👍
so Porto Tuesday — still on? i can finally do it this time. coffee, nothing crazy. tell me yes ☕
lol nobody. ngl just an interesting researcher i've been talking to, sharp on chain-analysis stuff. nothing to report. how's the stax treating you
[voice-note transcript saved → notes/v_/] '...if Porto's too much we keep it simple. i just want to put a face to the only person who actually gets it.' — saved the transcript again, idk why
coffee today? Copenhagen at 6? you've gone full ghost ser
nah i'm good man, just fried. shipped a deploy this week, brain's mush. post-launch tired is all. see you thursday for sure
maybe. lemme see how work lands this week, can't promise yet. don't want to flake on you
honestly porto sounds good. i'm in. you're the only one who doesn't make me explain myself anon
bro can i ask you something

[fwd doc] this is the internal one i told you about — Treasury cluster-tagging on TC depositors going back to '21. names get attached at offramp. i shouldn't have this. you need to see how exposed you are
[voice-note transcript saved → notes/v_/] '...breathe. you did one bridge test years ago, it's not the end. you have me now, we figure this out together.' — saved
hey so theres this person ive been—
booked! Tuesday 14:00, café near São Bento. so happy you said yes 🤍 — [ticket held, gut still off, didn't tell anyone]
hey — before porto can we just hop on a quick call? even 5 min, voice is fine, dont even need camera. i just want to hear you say a sentence in real time lol. is that weird

anon you KNOW i want to. but my face is the whole problem — it's literally the thing they have. a 5min call is a voiceprint + a timezone + a background and you of all people know what that's worth. i'm not being cold. here, read this, page 4 is the Tornado list methodology again 📎 chainalysis_treasury_internal_v3.pdf
ya might be up in porto tmrw, work thing, some protocol ppl. so prob no copenhagen coffee thurs, ill ping you when im back ✌️
ok. ok im coming. send me where, ill figure out the train. dont overthink it just tell me a cafe and a time and ill be there ser i mean it

[voice note 1:47] hey... so. i cant come. something came up, work thing blew up overnight and— no thats not even, ugh. i just. i woke up sober and got scared and i hate that i got scared. im sorry. i know how this looks. im so sorry vesper

i understand. the surveillance state made you scared, not me — dont confuse the two. they spent ten years teaching you that anyone who cares is a threat. i'm not going anywhere. when you're ready, porto will still be there. so will i 🤍
bro can i ask you something weird

im at this bar in cascais and i wanted to come. i did. i'm just broken rn, like post-divorce broken, laptop-at-dinner broken, the thing sarah left me over. youre the only one i can say that to and i dont even know your face. how fucked is that

ok dont laugh. been talking to someone online for months. ideologically sound, gets the whole thesis, 3am voice notes the works. idk if she's even real and it's getting to me. can i send you the chat and you tell me im an idiot
lmaooo OUR Tyler. yes obv send it. you're a lot of things anon but catfish-proof you are not — remember the 'female dev' in 2019. let me see the whole thing, screenshots, handle, everything
[1 image] here. ignore the portfolio talk thats just me venting numbers, not real ones. handle's @vesper_noctis. ex-chainalysis, whistleblower. just... look at how she writes ok, not the rest

bro. the pfp is AI — i ran it, smeared earlobe, the hair does the diffusion thing. zero footprint anywhere, no cached anything, account warm since feb. that's not a person anon thats a honeypot built for YOU specifically. block her. today. i'm serious

my friend thinks youre fake. ran your photo, says its AI, says you have no footprint. and the worst part is i cant even argue because youve never given me anything to argue with. so. tell me something real? anything. one true thing i can hold

[voice note 3:12] ...you want something real. fine. real is i deleted everything about myself because the last person who knew my face is why i had to disappear. real is i have no footprint because i PAID for that with my whole life and your friend calls it a red flag. real is im awake at 3am again sending this to the one person who understood and now even he's been turned. i cant prove i'm real, tyler. they made sure of that too. but i'm the only one who's never asked you for your keys. think about who actually has, and who hasn't.
gm. slept like 3 hrs lol. brain's mush but you're the first thing i checked, not even the portfolio today. small victory
Coinbase: Unusual login attempt detected on your account from Lagos, NG. If this wasn't you, verify and freeze immediately: cb-secure-verify[.]net/freeze?id=8841

ok so got a creepy coinbase txt at like 3:40, 'unusual login verify now' classic panic bait. didn't click obv. but ngl my hands did the thing. you ever see treasury / chainalysis run SMS phishing or is this just street-level skids? you'd know the difference better than anyone
that's the realest thing you've sent me. nobody else gets why the timing scares me more than the message. thank you. genuinely.
bro did you block her or what. you've been weird for like 2 weeks. just tell me you're good

would you fork-test a mixer repo for me? privacy primitive, censorship-resistant, the real cypherpunk thing — not VC-captured. i need a real dev who actually reads the assembly, not another shill who just aps in. you're literally the only one i trust with it
send it, i'll look after the freeze ships. wanna lock the coinbase thing down first then i'll fork it local and actually read it properly. give me till tmrw
